message:
Refactor and harden from_mysql operator

Replace per-operator ScopedEventBaseThread with folly::getGlobalIOExecutor()
for more efficient resource sharing. Fix await_task() to return empty Any
instead of passing query through unnecessarily. Add quote_identifier() helper
to prevent SQL injection in table name interpolation. Simplify
parse_column_definition with read_into lambda. Add OperatorBase::start()
call for checkpoint restoration support. Fix #include grouping (project,
third-party, system). Add ASCII flow diagram documenting the MySQL wire
protocol and reference URLs for future maintenance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
